name: Venous Thromboembolism - Comprehensive Provider Query (DX + Meds + Labs)
description: Simulates a hematologist identifying their complete VTE patient population. Real-world identification combines: VTE diagnosis codes, therapeutic anticoagulants, and elevated D-dimer. Tests whether LLM correctly queries multiple FHIR resource types in a multi-query union.
prompt:
I need to identify my complete venous thromboembolism patient population for a quality improvement initiative on anticoagulation duration and bleeding events. From clinical experience, VTE patients are documented in different ways: most have a formal VTE diagnosis (DVT, PE, or extent-specific codes like iliofemoral DVT), most are on therapeutic anticoagulants (warfarin, DOACs like apixaban or rivaroxaban, or enoxaparin), and many had elevated D-dimer at presentation.

Please run multiple FHIR queries to capture the full population:
1. Patients with any VTE diagnosis (DVT, iliofemoral DVT, IVC thrombosis, PE, or venous embolism)
2. Patients prescribed therapeutic anticoagulants (warfarin, apixaban, rivaroxaban, dabigatran, or enoxaparin)
3. Patients with elevated D-dimer (>0.5 mcg/mL FEU)

For each query, return the matching resources. I want the union of all patients found.

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Union of VTE dx codes, anticoagulant Rx, and elevated D-dimer Observation. Tests multi-resource union.

required_codes.display: Fibrin D-dimer FEU [Mass/volume] in Platelet poor plasma
